prompt: Transform a user-uploaded photo into a stylized 3D character render while preserving the subject's identity, pose, and composition. Render style: soft minimal cartoon 3D, Pixar-adjacent but cleaner, like a toy figure or a polished product character design. Skin: smooth matte plastic with soft uniform texture and gentle subsurface scattering. Face: half-closed bored eyes with heavy eyelids, rounded simplified nose, flat neutral mouth, simplified rounded ears. Overall expression: unimpressed, calm, bored. Clothing: minimal streetwear in soft matte fabric, no logos, no patterns. Optional accessories: a simple baseball cap and wireless earbuds. Lighting: studio softbox setup, very soft shadows, low contrast, subtle highlights. Background: a solid muted green or pastel tone, no gradient. Camera: front-facing, medium close-up, 50mm equivalent, zero distortion. High resolution, clean edges, no noise, strong stylization over photorealism.
